textByHashes.f346a09bcb6ba01352097129ea5cc726ee9c4b48: You! You're the reason I'm in here.
textByHashes.bdf5045a5573542ca8aa8e0ba5f54ff62d88cdf7: I hope you enjoy this moment, it won't last.
textByHashes.82c8c044cad658bedb1c43a266d7d15c28751052: Soon he will descend on this miserable lands and everything you know will be ash!
